name: N26
philosophy: An inspired interpretation of N26's design language — the European mobile-bank brand built on a strict white-on-white canvas with a serif display (Tiempos Headline) for marketing voice, a single signature N26 cyan-mint (#2DCFA5) accent, and a relentless minimalism: real product screenshots (the floating credit card on a colored gradient background) carry the entire visual identity. The brand reads as 'European premium neobank' — Berlin-clean, slightly architectural.

design_language.motion_signature: Signature is the floating card mockup with a subtle 4s breathing rotation (~3deg yaw); CTAs have a 100ms press-down; phone mockup screenshots fade in at 500ms on scroll.

trademark_signals: Floating credit card photograph as recurring hero device — the physical N26 card photographed on a soft pastel gradient background (mint, coral, or graphite), the brand's most-recognized commerce visual
Tiempos Headline serif at hero scale — weight 500 with -0.02em tracking, sizes 56–80px — the editorial differentiator from cleaner-but-coldernic neobanks
N26 cyan-mint (#2DCFA5) as the single CTA voltage — never blue, never green, the specific cool mint-cyan IS the brand
Pastel-card-gradient backgrounds — soft mint, coral, graphite gradients used as the background behind floating card photographs — never on body sections, only behind card visuals
Phone mockup with N26 app screenshot — the brand's product chrome with serif balance numbers and minimalist transaction rows
ai_slop_avoided: Don't paint the body background in pastel-card colors. The pastels are reserved exclusively for the area behind floating card photographs
Don't substitute the mint (#2DCFA5) with cyan or teal. The specific cool mint-cyan IS the brand
Don't drop Tiempos Headline for display. The serif voice is N26's editorial differentiator
Don't show the card flat on a white background. The card always floats on a pastel-gradient background with a subtle breathing rotation
Don't add a second voltage color. The mint is the only chromatic CTA accent
